---
title: "project2"
author: "Avery Cutright"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

FINAL CODE:
```{r}
# ── NCAA Women's Volleyball Dashboard ────────────────────────────────────────
library(shiny)
library(shinydashboard)
library(dplyr)
library(plotly)
library(DT)

BASE_URL <- "https://media.githubusercontent.com/media/JeffreyRStevens/ncaavolleyballr/refs/heads/main/data-csv/"
divs  <- c(1, 2, 3)
years <- 2020:2024
build_url <- function(div, year) paste0(BASE_URL, "wvb_playerseason_div", div, "_", year, ".csv")

per_game_stats <- c("Kills","Errors","Total Attacks","Assists","Aces","SErr","Digs","RErr", "RetAtt", "Block Solos","Block Assists","BErr","PTS","SrvAtt")

load_data <- function() {
  combos <- expand.grid(div = divs, year = years, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  dfs <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(combos)), function(i) {
    tryCatch({ df <- read.csv(build_url(combos$div[i], combos$year[i]), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE); df$Division <- paste0("Div ", combos$div[i]); df }, error = function(e) NULL)
  })
  raw <- bind_rows(Filter(Negate(is.null), dfs))
  raw$Pos[raw$Pos == "MH"] <- "MB"; raw$Pos[raw$Pos == "RS"] <- "OPP"; raw$Pos[raw$Pos == "LS"] <- "L"
  raw$GP <- as.numeric(raw$GP)
  for (col in per_game_stats) if (col %in% names(raw)) { raw[[col]] <- as.numeric(raw[[col]]); raw[[col]] <- ifelse(is.na(raw$GP)|raw$GP==0, NA, raw[[col]]/raw$GP) }
  raw$`Hit Pct` <- as.numeric(raw$`Hit Pct`)
  raw
}

pos_labels <- c("OH"="Outside Hitter (OH)","MB"="Middle Blocker/Hitter (MB)","S"="Setter (S)","OPP"="Opposite/Right Side (OPP)","DS"="Defensive Specialist / Libero (DS/L)","L"="Libero (L)")
stat_choices <- c("Kills/G","Errors/G","Total Attacks/G","Hit Pct","Assists/G","Aces/G","Digs/G","Return Attempts/G","Block Solos/G","Block Assists/G","PTS/G")
stat_col_map <- c("Kills/G"="Kills","Errors/G"="Errors","Total Attacks/G"="Total Attacks","Hit Pct"="Hit Pct","Assists/G"="Assists","Aces/G"="Aces","Digs/G"="Digs","Return Attempts/G"="RetAtt","Block Solos/G"="Block Solos","Block Assists/G"="Block Assists","PTS/G"="PTS")
pos_colors <- c("OH"="#00d4b4","MB"="#f5c518","S"="#9b5de5","OPP"="#ff5f57","DS"="#60a5fa","L"="#f97316")

custom_css <- "
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;600;700;800&family=Barlow:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap');
:root{--navy:#0a0e1a;--navy-mid:#111827;--navy-card:#161d2e;--navy-lite:#1e2a3e;--border:#2a3a52;--gold:#f5c518;--teal:#00d4b4;--coral:#ff5f57;--purple:#9b5de5;--text-hi:#f0f4ff;--text-mid:#8fa3c0;--text-lo:#4a5f7a;--grad-h:linear-gradient(135deg,#0d1b35 0%,#0a2040 50%,#061226 100%);}
*{box-sizing:border-box;}
body,.wrapper{background:var(--navy)!important;font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif!important;color:var(--text-hi)!important;}
.main-header .navbar,.main-header .logo{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#0a0e1a 0%,#0d1525 100%)!important;border-bottom:2px solid var(--gold)!important;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(245,197,24,0.12)!important;}
.main-header .logo{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif!important;font-weight:800!important;font-size:18px!important;letter-spacing:1.5px!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:var(--gold)!important;border-right:1px solid var(--border)!important;}
.main-header .navbar .sidebar-toggle{color:var(--text-mid)!important;}
.main-header .navbar .sidebar-toggle:hover{background:rgba(245,197,24,0.1)!important;color:var(--gold)!important;}
.main-sidebar{background:var(--navy-mid)!important;border-right:1px solid var(--border)!important;}
.sidebar-menu>li>a{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif!important;font-size:14px!important;font-weight:600!important;letter-spacing:0.8px!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:var(--text-mid)!important;border-left:3px solid transparent!important;padding:12px 16px!important;transition:all 0.2s ease!important;}
.sidebar-menu>li>a:hover,.sidebar-menu>li.active>a{background:rgba(245,197,24,0.06)!important;color:var(--gold)!important;border-left-color:var(--gold)!important;}
.sidebar-menu>li>a i{color:inherit!important;margin-right:10px!important;}
.sidebar .shiny-input-container label,.sidebar .control-label{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif!important;font-size:11px!important;font-weight:600!important;letter-spacing:1.5px!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:var(--text-lo)!important;display:block!important;margin-bottom:6px!important;}
.sidebar .checkbox label,.sidebar .radio label{color:var(--text-mid)!important;font-size:13px!important;font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif!important;}
.sidebar select,.sidebar .form-control{background:var(--navy-card)!important;border:1px solid var(--border)!important;color:var(--text-hi)!important;border-radius:6px!important;font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif!important;font-size:13px!important;padding:6px 10px!important;width:100%!important;}
.sidebar hr{border-color:var(--border)!important;margin:12px 10px!important;}
.sidebar .text-muted{color:var(--text-lo)!important;font-size:11px!important;line-height:1.5!important;display:block!important;}
.content-wrapper{background:var(--grad-h)!important;background-attachment:fixed!important;min-height:100vh!important;}
.content{padding:20px!important;}
.box{background:var(--navy-card)!important;border:1px solid var(--border)!important;border-top:none!important;border-radius:10px!important;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)!important;overflow:hidden!important;}
.box-header{background:transparent!important;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)!important;padding:14px 18px!important;}
.box-header .box-title{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif!important;font-size:14px!important;font-weight:700!important;letter-spacing:1.5px!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:var(--text-hi)!important;}
.box.box-solid.box-primary>.box-header{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(0,212,180,0.15),transparent)!important;border-left:3px solid var(--teal)!important;}
.box.box-solid.box-info>.box-header{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(155,93,229,0.15),transparent)!important;border-left:3px solid var(--purple)!important;}
.box.box-solid.box-warning>.box-header{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(245,197,24,0.15),transparent)!important;border-left:3px solid var(--gold)!important;}
.box-body{padding:16px!important;}
.shiny-input-container label,.control-label{font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif!important;font-size:11px!important;font-weight:600!important;letter-spacing:1.5px!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:var(--text-lo)!important;margin-bottom:5px!important;}
.form-control,select.form-control{background:var(--navy-lite)!important;border:1px solid var(--border)!important;color:var(--text-hi)!important;border-radius:6px!important;font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif!important;font-size:13px!important;}
.radio label,.checkbox label{color:var(--text-mid)!important;font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif!important;font-size:13px!important;}
.shiny-notification{background:var(--navy-card)!important;border:1px solid var(--border)!important;border-left:3px solid var(--teal)!important;border-radius:8px!important;color:var(--text-hi)!important;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif!important;}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px;height:6px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--navy-mid);}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--text-lo);}
.progress-bar{background-color:var(--teal)!important;}
.progress{background-color:var(--navy-lite)!important;border-radius:4px!important;}
.row{margin-bottom:0!important;}
.col-sm-12,.col-md-6,.col-md-4,.col-md-8,.col-md-3,.col-md-9{padding:8px!important;}
.content-header{display:none!important;}
"

ui <- dashboardPage(
  skin = "black",
  dashboardHeader(title = tags$span(
    tags$span(style="color:#f5c518;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:1px;","NCAA"),
    tags$span(style="color:#f0f4ff;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1px;margin-left:6px;","Women's Volleyball")
  )),
  dashboardSidebar(
    sidebarMenu(
      menuItem("Position Comp", tabName="poscomp", icon=icon("chart-bar")),
      menuItem("Scatter Plot",  tabName="scatter",  icon=icon("circle-dot")),
      menuItem("Radar Chart",   tabName="radar",    icon=icon("spider"))
    ),
    tags$hr(),
    tags$div(style="padding:0 10px;",
      checkboxGroupInput("div_filter","Division",choices=c("Div 1","Div 2","Div 3"),selected="Div 1"),
      selectInput("season_filter","Season",choices=rev(paste0(2020:2024,"-",2021:2025)),selected="2024-2025")
    ),
    tags$hr(),
    tags$div(class="text-muted",style="padding:4px 14px 12px;",tags$em("All stats shown per game (per GP)."),tags$br(),tags$br(),"Data: JeffreyRStevens/ncaavolleyballr")
  ),
  dashboardBody(
    tags$head(tags$style(HTML(custom_css)),tags$link(rel="stylesheet",href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;600;700;800&family=Barlow:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap")),
    tabItems(

      tabItem("poscomp",
        fluidRow(
          box(title="Players by Position", status="primary", solidHeader=TRUE, width=12,
              plotlyOutput("pos_count_plot", height=300))
        ),
        fluidRow(
          box(width=4, status="primary",
              radioButtons("comp_scale","View metrics as",
                           choices=c("Per game"="per_game","Season total"="total"),
                           selected="per_game", inline=TRUE),
              tags$hr(),
              selectInput("comp_stat","Statistic to Compare",choices=stat_choices,selected="Kills/G"),
              radioButtons("comp_type","Summary Type",choices=c("Mean","Median"),selected="Mean",inline=TRUE),
              checkboxGroupInput("comp_pos","Positions to Include",choices=names(pos_labels),selected=names(pos_labels))
          ),
          box(width=8, title="Position Comparison", status="info", solidHeader=TRUE,
              plotlyOutput("comp_plot", height=400))
        ),
        fluidRow(
          box(width=12, title="Distribution by Position — Violin", status="warning", solidHeader=TRUE,
              plotlyOutput("violin_plot", height=360))
        )
      ),

      tabItem("scatter",
        fluidRow(
          box(width=3, status="primary",
              selectInput("sc_x","X Axis",choices=stat_choices,selected="Kills/G"),
              selectInput("sc_y","Y Axis",choices=stat_choices,selected="Digs/G"),
              selectInput("sc_col","Color By (metric)",choices=stat_choices,selected="PTS/G"),
              tags$p(class="text-muted",style="font-size:11px;margin-top:6px;",tags$em("Shape = Position")),
              tags$hr(),
              checkboxGroupInput("sc_pos","Positions",choices=names(pos_labels),selected=names(pos_labels)),
              numericInput("sc_min_gp","Min Games Played",value=10,min=0)
          ),
          box(width=9, title="Player Scatter — per-game stats", status="info", solidHeader=TRUE,
              plotlyOutput("scatter_plot", height=500))
        )
      ),

      tabItem("radar",
        fluidRow(
          box(width=3, status="primary",
              checkboxGroupInput("radar_stats","Stats to Include",
                                 choices=stat_choices,
                                 selected=c("Kills/G","Assists/G","Digs/G","Block Solos/G","Aces/G","Hit Pct")),
              tags$hr(),
              checkboxGroupInput("radar_pos","Positions to Show",
                                 choices=names(pos_labels),
                                 selected=names(pos_labels)),
              tags$hr(),
              radioButtons("radar_summary","Summarise by",
                           choices=c("Mean","Median"),selected="Mean",inline=TRUE),
              tags$hr(),
              tags$p(class="text-muted",style="font-size:11px;",
                     tags$em("Values are min-max scaled (0\u20131) so all axes are comparable."))
          ),
          box(width=9, title="Position Radar Chart", status="info", solidHeader=TRUE,
              plotlyOutput("radar_plot", height=560))
        ),
        fluidRow(
          box(width=12, title="Plot a Custom Player Profile",
              status="warning", solidHeader=TRUE, collapsible=TRUE, collapsed=TRUE,
              tags$p(style="color:#8fa3c0;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:14px;",
                     "Enter per-game values for each active stat. Your profile will be scaled against the ",
                     "position averages and shown as a ",
                     tags$b(style="color:#f5c518;","gold dashed line"), " on the radar."),
              fluidRow(
                column(9, uiOutput("custom_inputs")),
                column(3,
                  tags$br(),
                  textInput("custom_label","Profile label",value="My Player",placeholder="e.g. Jane Smith"),
                  tags$br(),
                  actionButton("custom_reset","Reset values",
                               style="background:#1e2a3e;color:#8fa3c0;border:1px solid #2a3a52;border-radius:6px;font-family:\'Barlow Condensed\',sans-serif;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:1px;width:100%;")
                )
              )
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

plotly_layout <- function(p, ...) {
  p %>% layout(
    plot_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)", paper_bgcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font=list(family="Barlow, sans-serif",color="#8fa3c0",size=12),
    xaxis=list(gridcolor="rgba(42,58,82,0.6)",zerolinecolor="rgba(42,58,82,0.8)",tickfont=list(family="Barlow, sans-serif",size=11,color="#8fa3c0"),titlefont=list(family="Barlow Condensed, sans-serif",size=13,color="#8fa3c0")),
    yaxis=list(gridcolor="rgba(42,58,82,0.6)",zerolinecolor="rgba(42,58,82,0.8)",tickfont=list(family="Barlow, sans-serif",size=11,color="#8fa3c0"),titlefont=list(family="Barlow Condensed, sans-serif",size=13,color="#8fa3c0")),
    legend=list(bgcolor="rgba(22,29,46,0.8)",bordercolor="rgba(42,58,82,0.8)",borderwidth=1,font=list(family="Barlow Condensed, sans-serif",size=12,color="#8fa3c0")),
    hoverlabel=list(bgcolor="#0a0e1a",bordercolor="#2a3a52",font=list(family="Barlow, sans-serif",size=12,color="#f0f4ff")),
    margin=list(t=20,b=50,l=50,r=20),
    ...
  )
}

server <- function(input, output, session) {

  raw_data <- reactive({
    withProgress(message="Loading NCAA Women's Volleyball data\u2026", value=0.1, { df <- load_data(); incProgress(0.8); df })
  })

  filtered <- reactive({
    df <- raw_data(); req(nrow(df) > 0)
    if (length(input$div_filter) > 0) df <- df[df$Division %in% input$div_filter, ]
    if (!is.null(input$season_filter) && input$season_filter != "All") df <- df[df$Season == input$season_filter, ]
    df[df$Pos %in% names(pos_labels), ]
  })

  col_name <- function(label) unname(stat_col_map[label])

  # Players by position count chart
  output$pos_count_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered()
    if (length(input$comp_pos) == 0) return(NULL)
    df <- df[df$Pos %in% input$comp_pos, ]
    count_df <- df %>% count(Pos) %>% arrange(desc(n)) %>% mutate(color = pos_colors[Pos])
    p <- plot_ly(count_df, x=~reorder(Pos,-n), y=~n, type="bar",
                 marker=list(color=~color, line=list(color="rgba(0,0,0,0)",width=0)),
                 text=~n, textposition="outside",
                 textfont=list(family="Barlow Condensed",size=13,color="#f0f4ff"),
                 hovertemplate=~paste0("<b>",Pos,"</b><br>Players: ",n,"<extra></extra>"))
    plotly_layout(p, xaxis=list(title="",gridcolor="rgba(0,0,0,0)",tickfont=list(family="Barlow Condensed",size=14,color="#8fa3c0")), yaxis=list(title="Number of Players"), showlegend=FALSE)
  })

  # Position comparison bar chart
  output$comp_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered()
    if (length(input$comp_pos) == 0) return(NULL)
    df <- df[df$Pos %in% input$comp_pos, ]
    cname <- col_name(input$comp_stat)
    is_rate <- cname == "Hit Pct"
    if (input$comp_scale == "total" && !is_rate) {
      df$plot_val <- df[[cname]] * df$GP
    } else {
      df$plot_val <- df[[cname]]
    }
    y_label <- if (input$comp_scale == "total" && !is_rate)
      sub("/G$", " (season total)", input$comp_stat) else input$comp_stat
    summary_df <- df %>% group_by(Pos) %>%
      summarise(val=if(input$comp_type=="Mean") mean(plot_val,na.rm=TRUE) else median(plot_val,na.rm=TRUE), n=n(), .groups="drop") %>%
      arrange(desc(val))
    p <- plot_ly(summary_df, x=~reorder(Pos,val), y=~val, type="bar",
                 marker=list(color=pos_colors[summary_df$Pos], line=list(color="rgba(0,0,0,0)",width=0)),
                 text=~paste0("n = ",n), textposition="outside",
                 textfont=list(family="Barlow Condensed",size=12,color="#8fa3c0"),
                 hovertemplate="<b>%{x}</b><br>%{y:.3f}<extra></extra>")
    plotly_layout(p, xaxis=list(title=""), yaxis=list(title=paste(input$comp_type, y_label)), showlegend=FALSE,
                  title=list(text=paste(input$comp_type,"\u00b7",y_label,"by Position"),font=list(family="Barlow Condensed",size=15,color="#f0f4ff"),x=0.01))
  })

  # Violin plot
  output$violin_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered()
    if (length(input$comp_pos) == 0) return(NULL)
    df <- df[df$Pos %in% input$comp_pos, ]
    cname <- col_name(input$comp_stat)
    is_rate <- cname == "Hit Pct"
    if (input$comp_scale == "total" && !is_rate) {
      df$plot_val <- df[[cname]] * df$GP
    } else {
      df$plot_val <- df[[cname]]
    }
    y_label <- if (input$comp_scale == "total" && !is_rate)
      sub("/G$", " (season total)", input$comp_stat) else input$comp_stat
    df <- df[!is.na(df$plot_val), ]
    hex_to_rgba <- function(hex, alpha=0.15) {
      sprintf("rgba(%d,%d,%d,%.2f)", strtoi(substr(hex,2,3),16L), strtoi(substr(hex,4,5),16L), strtoi(substr(hex,6,7),16L), alpha)
    }
    positions <- sort(unique(df$Pos))
    p <- plot_ly(type="violin")
    for (pos in positions) {
      sub <- df[df$Pos==pos,]
      p <- add_trace(p, y=sub$plot_val, x=rep(pos,nrow(sub)), name=pos, type="violin",
                     box=list(visible=TRUE), meanline=list(visible=TRUE,color="#f5c518"),
                     points="outliers", line=list(color=pos_colors[pos]),
                     fillcolor=hex_to_rgba(pos_colors[pos],0.15),
                     marker=list(color=pos_colors[pos],size=4,opacity=0.5), hoverinfo="y+name")
    }
    plotly_layout(p, xaxis=list(title=""), yaxis=list(title=y_label), showlegend=FALSE, violingap=0.05, violingroupgap=0)
  })

  # Scatter plot
  output$scatter_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered()
    if (length(input$sc_pos) == 0) return(NULL)
    df <- df[df$Pos %in% input$sc_pos, ]
    df <- df[!is.na(df$GP) & df$GP >= input$sc_min_gp, ]
    cx <- col_name(input$sc_x); cy <- col_name(input$sc_y); cz <- col_name(input$sc_col)
    df <- df[!is.na(df[[cx]]) & !is.na(df[[cy]]) & !is.na(df[[cz]]), ]
    pos_symbols <- c("OH"="circle","MB"="square","S"="triangle-up","OPP"="diamond","DS"="cross","L"="star")
    col_range <- range(df[[cz]], na.rm=TRUE)
    positions <- sort(unique(df$Pos))
    p <- plot_ly(type="scatter", mode="markers")
    for (i in seq_along(positions)) {
      pos <- positions[i]; sub <- df[df$Pos==pos,]
      if (nrow(sub)==0) next
      p <- add_trace(p, data=sub, x=~get(cx), y=~get(cy), name=pos, legendgroup=pos, showlegend=TRUE,
                     text=~paste0("<b>",Player,"</b>","<br>",Team," \u00b7 ",Pos," \u00b7 ",Yr,
                                  "<br>",input$sc_x,": <b>",round(get(cx),3),"</b>",
                                  "<br>",input$sc_y,": <b>",round(get(cy),3),"</b>",
                                  "<br>",input$sc_col,": <b>",round(get(cz),3),"</b>"),
                     hoverinfo="text",
                     marker=list(symbol=pos_symbols[[pos]], color=~get(cz),
                                 colorscale=list(c(0,"#0a1628"),c(0.25,"#0d4f8c"),c(0.5,"#00d4b4"),c(0.75,"#f5c518"),c(1,"#ff5f57")),
                                 cmin=col_range[1], cmax=col_range[2], showscale=(i==1),
                                 colorbar=list(title=list(text=input$sc_col,font=list(family="Barlow Condensed",size=12,color="#8fa3c0")),
                                               tickfont=list(family="Barlow",size=10,color="#8fa3c0"),
                                               bgcolor="rgba(22,29,46,0.8)",bordercolor="rgba(42,58,82,0.8)",borderwidth=1,thickness=14),
                                 size=9, opacity=0.85, line=list(width=1,color="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)")))
    }
    plotly_layout(p, xaxis=list(title=input$sc_x), yaxis=list(title=input$sc_y),
                  legend=list(title=list(text="<b>Shape = Position</b>",font=list(family="Barlow Condensed",size=12,color="#8fa3c0"))))
  })

  # ── Radar chart ─────────────────────────────────────────────

  # Render one numericInput per selected stat with data range as hint
  output$custom_inputs <- renderUI({
    req(length(input$radar_stats) >= 1)
    df   <- filtered()
    cols <- stat_col_map[input$radar_stats]
    inputs <- lapply(seq_along(input$radar_stats), function(i) {
      lbl <- input$radar_stats[i]
      col <- unname(cols[i])
      id  <- paste0("custom_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]", "_", lbl))
      rng <- range(df[[col]], na.rm=TRUE)
      hint <- sprintf("range: %.2f – %.2f", rng[1], rng[2])
      column(3,
        numericInput(id, label=tags$span(lbl, tags$small(style="color:#4a5f7a;display:block;", hint)),
                     value=NA, min=0, step=0.01, width="100%")
      )
    })
    do.call(fluidRow, inputs)
  })

  # Reset all custom inputs to NA when button clicked
  observeEvent(input$custom_reset, {
    req(length(input$radar_stats) >= 1)
    for (lbl in input$radar_stats) {
      id <- paste0("custom_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]", "_", lbl))
      updateNumericInput(session, id, value=NA)
    }
  })

  output$radar_plot <- renderPlotly({
    df <- filtered()
    req(length(input$radar_stats) >= 3, length(input$radar_pos) >= 1)
    stat_cols  <- stat_col_map[input$radar_stats]
    summary_fn <- if (input$radar_summary == "Mean") mean else median
    radar_df <- df %>%
      filter(Pos %in% names(pos_labels)) %>%
      group_by(Pos) %>%
      summarise(across(all_of(unname(stat_cols)),
                       ~summary_fn(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
                .groups = "drop")
    for (col in unname(stat_cols)) {
      rng <- range(radar_df[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
      radar_df[[col]] <- if (diff(rng) == 0) 0.5 else
        (radar_df[[col]] - rng[1]) / diff(rng)
    }
    # Filter to only the positions the user has selected
    radar_df <- radar_df[radar_df$Pos %in% input$radar_pos, ]
    req(nrow(radar_df) >= 1)
    theta_labels <- input$radar_stats
    # Use dashboard palette to stay consistent with other charts
    radar_colors <- c(
      "OH"="#00d4b4", "MB"="#f5c518", "S"="#9b5de5",
      "OPP"="#ff5f57", "DS"="#60a5fa", "L"="#f97316"
    )
    p <- plot_ly(type="scatterpolar", mode="lines+markers", fill="toself")
    for (pos in radar_df$Pos) {
      row    <- radar_df[radar_df$Pos == pos, unname(stat_cols), drop = FALSE]
      values <- c(as.numeric(row), as.numeric(row)[1])
      theta  <- c(theta_labels, theta_labels[1])
      clr    <- radar_colors[[pos]]
      rgb    <- strtoi(c(substr(clr,2,3), substr(clr,4,5), substr(clr,6,7)), 16L)
      p <- add_trace(p,
        r         = values,
        theta     = theta,
        name      = pos,
        line      = list(color = clr, width = 2),
        marker    = list(color = clr, size = 6),
        fillcolor = paste0("rgba(", paste(rgb, collapse=","), ",0.12)")
      )
    }
    # ---- Custom player trace ------------------------------------------------
    # Collect values from dynamic inputs
    custom_vals <- sapply(input$radar_stats, function(lbl) {
      id  <- paste0("custom_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]", "_", lbl))
      val <- input[[id]]
      if (is.null(val) || is.na(val)) NA_real_ else as.numeric(val)
    })

    if (!all(is.na(custom_vals))) {
      # Scale the custom values using the SAME raw ranges as the position averages
      # so the custom point sits correctly relative to the position polygons
      df_raw <- filtered()
      stat_cols_raw <- stat_col_map[input$radar_stats]
      raw_df <- df_raw %>%
        filter(Pos %in% names(pos_labels)) %>%
        group_by(Pos) %>%
        summarise(across(all_of(unname(stat_cols_raw)), ~summary_fn(.x, na.rm=TRUE)), .groups="drop")

      scaled_custom <- mapply(function(val, col) {
        rng <- range(raw_df[[col]], na.rm=TRUE)
        if (is.na(val)) NA_real_
        else if (diff(rng) == 0) 0.5
        else max(0, min(1, (val - rng[1]) / diff(rng)))  # clamp to [0,1]
      }, custom_vals, unname(stat_cols_raw))

      # Only plot if at least one value was entered; use 0 for missing stats
      plot_vals   <- ifelse(is.na(scaled_custom), 0, scaled_custom)
      label       <- if (nchar(trimws(input$custom_label)) > 0) trimws(input$custom_label) else "Custom"
      closed_vals <- c(plot_vals, plot_vals[1])
      closed_theta <- c(theta_labels, theta_labels[1])

      p <- add_trace(p,
        r         = closed_vals,
        theta     = closed_theta,
        name      = label,
        mode      = "lines+markers",
        fill      = "toself",
        line      = list(color="#f5c518", width=2.5, dash="dash"),
        marker    = list(color="#f5c518", size=8,
                         line=list(color="#0a0e1a", width=1.5)),
        fillcolor = "rgba(245,197,24,0.08)"
      )
    }
    # -------------------------------------------------------------------------

    p %>% layout(
      polar = list(
        bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
        radialaxis = list(
          visible   = TRUE,
          range     = c(0, 1),
          tickvals  = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1),
          ticktext  = c("0", "0.25", "0.5", "0.75", "1"),
          gridcolor = "rgba(42,58,82,0.6)",
          linecolor = "rgba(42,58,82,0.8)",
          tickfont  = list(family="Barlow, sans-serif", size=10, color="#8fa3c0")
        ),
        angularaxis = list(
          gridcolor = "rgba(42,58,82,0.6)",
          linecolor = "rgba(42,58,82,0.8)",
          tickfont  = list(family="Barlow Condensed, sans-serif", size=12, color="#8fa3c0")
        )
      ),
      legend = list(
        title       = list(text="<b>Position</b>",
                           font=list(family="Barlow Condensed",size=12,color="#8fa3c0")),
        bgcolor     = "rgba(22,29,46,0.8)",
        bordercolor = "rgba(42,58,82,0.8)",
        borderwidth = 1,
        font        = list(family="Barlow Condensed",size=12,color="#8fa3c0")
      ),
      plot_bgcolor  = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      font          = list(family="Barlow, sans-serif", color="#8fa3c0"),
      hoverlabel    = list(bgcolor="#0a0e1a", bordercolor="#2a3a52",
                           font=list(family="Barlow, sans-serif",size=12,color="#f0f4ff")),
      margin        = list(t=20, b=20, l=20, r=20)
    )
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```
